typecheck.command: uv run mypy src/ && cd frontend && npm exec tsc -b --pretty false
typecheck.details: mypy: no issues found in 29 source files; frontend TypeScript build check also exited 0 via npm exec -- tsc -b --pretty false

lint.command: uv run ruff check src/ && cd frontend && npm run lint
lint.details: ruff: all checks passed; eslint: passed
